# Genesis Conductor

> Enterprise orchestration for generative AI workflows. Runs agent graphs, batch jobs, evals, and data pipelines across model providers — with reproducible runs, fine-grained traces, and replay from any step.

Genesis Conductor is built by Kovach Enterprises on the ConductorKit design system with Barcelona-Extropic display typography. It ships as a web dashboard, developer CLI/SDKs, docs, and a public API, deployed as a 9-plugin Coalition service mesh on Cloudflare Workers with Ed25519 audit chains.

## Primary surfaces

- [Marketing landing](/index.html#marketing): product overview, hero, metrics band, feature grid, pipelines-as-code example
- [Product dashboard](/index.html#dashboard): Jobs, Pipelines, Run detail, live logs, step timeline
- [Type specimen](/index.html#specimen): Barcelona-Extropic field manual — display type, chirality, kinetic, Didone-class 12:1 contrast

## Platform capabilities

- Pipeline orchestration as typed graphs (TypeScript SDK, Python SDK, YAML)
- Reproducible runs: pin model versions, capture inputs, replay from any step
- Fine-grained traces: every step, every token, every tool call
- Structured evals: offline evals gated on pass-rate, latency, cost budgets
- Cost controls: per-pipeline budgets, per-tenant quotas, automatic fallback routing
- Multi-provider: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Mistral, local
- STARK-verified computation with Ed25519 audit chain
- ≥70% thermodynamic waste reduction via heterogeneous backend scheduling (ROCm, CUDAq, QUBO, Metal-MPS, D-Wave)

## Design system

Two systems compose:
- ConductorKit — dark-first operator UI, thin-stroke icons, single signal-green accent, tabular-numeric data rows
- Barcelona-Extropic — Didone-class display serif, 12:1 stem-to-serif contrast, chirality transforms, kinetic skew variant

## Contact

- Web: https://genesisconductor.io
- Docs: https://docs.genesisconductor.io
- Status: https://status.genesisconductor.io
